puzzleDescription: Strings are complex. Capturing a single word is easy, but capturing a full phrase requires the nextLine buffer. Create a short bio based on user input.
objective:
1. Input your full name.
2. Input your favorite programming language.
3. Print: '[Name] loves coding in [Language]!'.
hints: sc.nextLine() reads everything until you press Enter.
sc.next() only reads until the first space it finds.
To add an exclamation point at the end, use + "!" in your println.
